subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Praised, that he may be assured through the grace of God and make mention of Him amongst His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله العزیز الحمید لیطمئن بفضل الله و یذکره بین عباده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
